title: The Midlanders
director: Joseph De Grasse, Ida May Park
actors: Bessie Love, Truman Van Dyke, Sydney Deane
plot: Aurelie, an orphan, escapes from a New Orleans convent and is adopted by Mississippi riverboat captain Lindstrom. So that she can have a more settled life, he sends her to live with his brother, John Lindstrom, a squatter in a sma...
